name: Caitlin G.
detailed_review:
What do you like best about Synup?

The team treats you like you're important. They are proactive in getting meetings scheduled to ensure things are going well, they are helpful when questions arise. The product is also pretty intuitive and user-friendly. With a quick overview from the team, it's relatively easy to figure things out.

‍

What do you dislike about Synup?

They are busy because they are growing, so sometimes response times to questions can be a little longer. They always acknowledge and ensure you have an idea of timing on their end. I do wish there were more obvious ways to pull reports and filter data. We also have issues with some updates populating in Google and have to do those manually.

‍

What problems is Synup solving and how is that benefiting you?

Managing accurate business listing information for a large organization. They help us distribute location updates and information in one central platform. I also work for a brand that has acquired a number of other companies and locations, so it is important to have a tool to centralize location details.
reviewer_details:
Co-Founder & Paid Conversion Strategist

Small-Business (50 or fewer emp.)
